title: VerifiedQuery
description: VerifiedQuery represents a (question, sql) pair that has been manually verified (e.g. by an analyst) to be correct.

name.description: A name for this verified query. Mainly used for display purposes.

sql.description: The correct SQL query for answering the question.

verified_at.description: Timestamp at which the query was last verified - measures in seconds since epoch, in UTC.

verified_by.description: Name of the person who verified this query.
